content.en:
Swish!

Ye Tian turned into the light of the Supreme Dao Flowing Body Technique, and instantly leaped over, killing these Supreme Dao Void Demons in an instant.

They were all extremely powerful Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons, and a few of them were even on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List, but as a result, they didn't have any resistance at all in Ye Tian's hands, like ants.

Soon.

Ye Tian came directly to the Second Heavenly Blood Fortress.

Rumble!!!!

The Heavenly Blood No. 2 Fortress was directly shattered by Ye Tian, killing the Supreme Dao Void Demon inside.

Next, Ye Tian killed the Supreme Dao Void Demon when he saw it.

At this time, the Supreme Dao Void Demon didn't think about escaping from the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, after all, there was only one person in Ye Tian, and there were too many Supreme Dao Void Demons, and the Blood Chaos and them, the powerhouses on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List, were still there.

Therefore, Blood Chaos immediately reorganized to the Dao Void Demon Army and prepared to besiege and kill Ye Tian.

It didn't take long for hundreds of thousands of Supreme Dao Void Demons to form and lock Ye Tian's position under the leadership of Blood Chaos, and Ye Tian didn't leave, just waiting for Blood Chaos' arrival.

With so many Supreme Dao Void Demons, if they were combined into a large array, they would indeed have the hope of killing Ye Tian.

However, Ye Tian is not going to use only one real body to copy the body this time, even if this real body copy body falls, he can continue to dispatch a second real body to copy the body.

"It's coming!"

Ye Tian stood in the void and looked into the distance.

Rumble!!!

In the distance, the figure of Blood Chaos appeared, and there were many Supreme Void Demons behind him.

They had already learned about Ye Tian's strength from the other fallen Supreme Dao Void Demon transmissions, a fifth-fold Supreme Dao realm who had walked the strongest to the Dao, and had also comprehended the rules of the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao.

So, they have to join forces.

"Assemble into a big array!"

Blood Chaos commanded.

In the next moment, some Supreme Dao Void Demons joined forces to form a terrifying Supreme Dao Void Demon Giant, each of which was a combination of a large number of Supreme Dao Void Demons with a combination of formations.

However, more of the Supreme Path Void Demons still acted alone, after all, they did not participate in such training and could not cooperate with each other.

Soon.

More than 300 Dao Void Demon Giants were condensed, and each giant possessed the strength of the powerhouses on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List, which was equivalent to more than 300 Heavenly Blood Void Demon List powerhouses!

Of course, maintaining such a large array consumes a lot of money, and the Void Demon side of the Dao Void Demon has used its hole cards, so it can only end the battle quickly.

Rumble!!!!

An eight-pattern supreme dao weapon appeared, and then a group of supreme dao void demons sacrificed their lives, which prompted this eight-vein supreme dao weapon.

In an instant, the void was blocked, and the sixth sequence to the rule silk threads spread towards Ye Tian's side, suppressing Ye Tian's strength.

"The foundation of the Supreme Dao Void Demon is really powerful, I have a little underestimate the Supreme Dao Void Demon!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he did not panic.

He held the Seven Patterns Supreme Dao Weapon Spear and rushed directly over.

"Kill!"

The two sides fought.

A Supreme Dao Void Demon Giant was directly penetrated by Ye Tian's shot, the formation was broken, and a Supreme Dao Void Demon inside was revealed, and then turned into powder, almost all of them fell at the same time.

And at this time, more and more Supreme Dao Void Demons surrounded Ye Tian with suicidal attacks.

And Ye Tian's sixth sequence of Supreme Dao rules erupted, and dense regular silk threads spread all over the void, strangling one Supreme Dao Void Demon after another.

But Ye Tian also withstood a large number of attacks, the armor on his body continued to crack, and he only relied on the Supreme Dao Vajra Body Protector that was integrated into the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, but he was still injured.

Time passed little by little, and this void was full of fragments of the corpse of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, and Ye Tian's injuries were getting more and more serious.

Blood Chaos has not struck all along, but has been commanding from the rear.

He didn't dare to make a move, because he couldn't withstand Ye Tian's attack, and once he was hit by Ye Tian, he would have to die!

His purpose was to consume Ye Tian!

......

Heavenly Blood City No. 1.

Long Wu, Long Xu and the others in the Dao Realm also knew about the big battle that took place on the side of the Dao Void Demon at this time, after all, Ye Tian's ranking on the Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon List had improved too quickly, and he was about to take the first place.

They used the Dao weapon to probe, and there was a great battle over there.

"On the side of the Dao Void Demons, a large number of Dao Void Demons have fallen, and even the battle river is dead!"

"In a short period of time, there have been almost twenty powerhouses on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List over there, it should be Ye Tian who is frantically slaughtering the Supreme Dao Void Demon!"

"How could Ye Tian have such strength???

"Maybe it's that you broke through to the Fifth Rank Dao Realm and comprehended the Sixth Sequence Path Rules?

"Without further ado, just give the order to attack!"

Subsequently.

A large number of Supreme Dao Realms set out from one Heavenly Blood City after another, invading the Dao Void Demons.

This time, they are going to counterattack the Dao Void Demon.

When they arrived at the territory of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, they found that there was almost no obstacle, and most of the Supreme Dao Void Demon was supporting the Blood Chaos to besiege Ye Tian, so naturally there was no strength to defend here.

Thereupon.

The Supreme Dao Realm of the Heavenly Dragon Domain killed through the Supreme Dao Void Demons all the way, and continued to snatch resources along the way, buying up the resources of one fortress after another.

And on Ye Tian's side, the battle is about to end.

At this time.

Ye Tian's whole body was cracked, the Seven Patterns to Dao Rule Spear in his hand was about to be scrapped, his strength was consumed too much, and his combat effectiveness had seriously declined.

However, he had killed too many Supreme Void Demons.

"I haven't escaped yet!"

The blood chaos was very unexpected.

It stands to reason that if Ye Tian fled, they might not be able to catch up, but Ye Tian had killed them to this extent.

"Could it be that this is not his real body?"

Blood Chaos secretly said in his heart.

He had heard of Ye Tian before, and knew a little about the situation, if Ye Tian was not his real body, then they would lose a lot of blood!

"Kill!"

Bloody Roar.

Fighting to such an extent, he had to take out Ye Tian.

Immediately, he also killed him.

It was another tragic battle, and Ye Tian's replica body finally couldn't bear it.

Click!

The flesh shattered and dissipated.

Just as Blood Chaos breathed a sigh of relief, a voice came from the void.

"Ants can really gnaw elephants to death, I thought I could sweep you, but I didn't expect you to really kill my clone!"

As soon as the words fell, Ye Tian tore through the void and walked out.

"Ye Tian, you ......"

Blood Chao's face changed greatly, and it was really Ye Tian's clone just now.

Now, most of their strength has been wiped out, and all of them are not lightly injured, how can they kill Ye Tian?

"Run!"

He was only thinking about escaping from the Heavenly Blood Battlefield now, and he had no other thoughts at all.

However, where is his speed as fast as Ye Tian!

In an instant, Ye Tian caught up with the Blood Chaos.

Burst!

Blood Chaos looked at his penetrated body, the power of the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules was strangling his vitality, and he was completely desperate.

Bang!

The bloody body exploded and completely fell to death.
